title: Grilled Sirloin Steak with Italian Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful dish featuring a grilled sirloin steak served with a colorful Italian-inspired stir fry.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat (400°F). Season the steak with salt and black pepper.
Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
While the steak is cooking, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the bell peppers and onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the mushrooms and cook for another 2-3 minutes, until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Stir in the Italian seasoning and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Serve the steak with the Italian stir fry alongside.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
